name: com.deucarian.template.game.survivors
description: Playable Unity game template for a Survivors-style horde roguelite loop with package-based genre-kit adapters, pressure enemies, build mutations, and a 30-minute sample arc.

samples.description: A playable Survivors-style slice with five default weapons, pressure enemy roles, projectile/orbit/melee/burst/hitscan/payload options, status and barrier upgrades, XP gems, timed relic/level-up choices, class loadouts, passive atlases, weapon tracks, boss/victory flow, rewards, meta progression, persistence, and restart flow.
